title: tontanea canescens
intro: Tontanea canescens, also known as the Chilean cinnamon tree, is a type of shrub native to South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tontanea canescens include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing pain relief. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in tinctures and topical applications.
